systemStatus.headline: Sat Jun 27 7 AM run COMPLETE (Gmail + LIVE Chrome scrapes). TOAST: freshest now Fri Jun 26 DETAILED summary (Net $7,451.90 / Gross $7,747.90 / 272 guests / 163 orders / Voids 14 items / Labor 13.3% / Discount 3.8%) -- up vs Thu Jun 25 net $5,993.65. GOOGLE ADS: LIVE scrape Jun 26 = 8,957 impr / 195 clicks / $57.52 / 1.00 conv; World Cup HQ now fully Eligible (recovered). YELP: LIVE scrape -- 39k ad impr / 468 clicks / 128 leads (30d). TRIPADVISOR: nothing actionable. REVIEWS: 2 unanswered 5* under 1 week (Patrick Williams Jun 25, Eric Groos Jun 21). GitHub PAT 200 OK. systemStatus.detail: Sat Jun 27 7 AM pass: Gmail + LIVE Chrome scrapes of Google Ads and Yelp Ads. (1) TOAST: Fri Jun 26 detailed All-Locations summary now in hand and is freshest -- Net $7,451.90, Gross $7,747.90, 272 guests, 163 orders, avg/guest $27.40, avg/order $45.72, Labor 13.3% (~$991.10), Discounts 3.8% (~$294.42), 14 void items, Refunds $0, 46 card payments. SDLW (Fri Jun 19) not in email so comparison fields null. Thu Jun 25 moved to last-known. (2) SLING: Sat Jun 27 daily report arrived (11 emp / 63 hrs / 12 shifts / 0 uncovered / 0 OT / 1 off); totals only, per-person roster not in email. (3) GOOGLE ADS LIVE (Jun 26): 8,957 impr / 195 clicks / CTR 2.18% / Avg CPC $0.29 / cost $57.52; budget $58.37/day; 1.00 conversion. World Cup HQ 2026 now fully 'Eligible' (recovered from Limited). 7d (Jun 20-26): 60,892 impr / 1,199 clicks / $386.48 / 252.67 conv. (4) YELP LIVE (30d): 39k ad impr (80%), 468 ad clicks, 569 ad page visits (61%), 128 ad leads (73%); 12mo leads Ads 1,006 / Organic 750 / Total 1,756. Ad spend not refreshed (Billing needs password re-login, skipped). (5) TRIPADVISOR: no analytics ad email. (6) REVIEWS: Patrick Williams (Jun 25) + Eric Groos (Jun 21) 5* still unanswered.

toast.source: 'The Brewhouse Santa Barbara Group - Friday, June 26' Daily Performance Summary (All Locations; only location = 229 West Montecito Street). Freshest Toast at the Sat Jun 27 7 AM run.
toast.note: Fri Jun 26 (detailed All-Locations Group summary): Net $7,451.90, Gross $7,747.90. 272 guests, 163 orders, avg/guest $27.40, avg/order $45.72. Labor 13.3% of net (~$991.10 derived), Discounts 3.8% of gross (~$294.42 derived), 14 void items, Refunds $0.00, Gift cards $0.00, 46 card payments. Same-day-last-week (Fri Jun 19) comparison not in this email -- SDLW/4-wk fields left null. Strong day vs the Thu Jun 25 net of $5,993.65.
